word: H6225 - עָשַׁן - ʻâshan - aw-shan' - Be angry smoke

sections.paragraph:
Original: עשׁן

Transliteration: ‛âshan

Phonetic: aw-shan'

BDB Definition:

  1. to smoke, be angry, be wroth
    1. (Qal)
      1. to smoke
      2. to fume, be wroth, be furious

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1712

Part(s) of speech: Verb
